query: Use datocms-setup-cma-types to add generate-cma-types, the CMA token env placeholder, and the cma-types.ts output path for this project.
Please run datocms-setup-cma-types. I want standalone DatoCMS schema types for raw CMA operations but I do not want GraphQL query codegen.
Invoke datocms-setup-cma-types in this SvelteKit repo and configure the framework-specific CMA token plus output file.
How do I set up gql.tada for DatoCMS GraphQL queries?
I need to create records in DatoCMS using @datocms/cma-client-node.
Use datocms-setup-graphql-types to configure GraphQL query types.
